programme.title: The Fast History Of
programme.desc: The filmmaker delves into the history of a popular cookie-manufacturing company that overcame several obstacles to make a mark in the market.

programme.title: Food Tech
programme.desc: Discover the secret behind a fluffy pancake and other dishes as Bobby Bognar enjoys a hearty breakfast in the United States.

credits.actor: Bobby Bognar

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy confuses profit with prophet but still manages to be successful while Kenny tries to honour the history of San Bernardino.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Jarrod Schulz,Brandi Passante,Dave Hester,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Brandon Sheets,Ivy Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Casey Nezhoda,Thom Beers,Emily Wears,Mary Padian,Kenny Crossley,Justin Bryant,Edwina Registre,Shana Dahan,Barry Weiss

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Dave acquires nearly half while Ivy secures a tidy profit. However, Mary and Kenny ultimately shoulder the bulk of the work.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Jarrod Schulz,Brandi Passante,Dave Hester,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Brandon Sheets,Ivy Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Casey Nezhoda,Thom Beers,Emily Wears,Mary Padian,Kenny Crossley

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Knife or Death
programme.desc: The bladesmiths, martial artists and knife thrower who survived the intimidating course are back to prove their skills in the final showdown.

credits.actor: Bill Goldberg,Tu Lam,Travis Wuertz

programme.title: Roads Unknown: India
programme.desc: Jess and the crew continue to explore the wonders of Jaipur, uncovering more cultural treasures and reunite with Pulak for the final stretch to Delhi.

credits.actor: Jessica Zahra

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: Dan Aykroyd sheds light on shipwrecks, plane crashes and UFO sightings. Later, he explores the Lake Michigan Triangle, weird wilderness and other spooky places.

credits.actor: Dan Aykroyd

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Marc is weighed down by a load that might just be more than the Boar can tackle. Meanwhile, Dusty gets stuck hauling some very unique art sculptures.

credits.actor: Marc Springer,Jennifer Brennan,Jarrett Joyce,Christopher Hanna,Robbie Welsh,Dusty Davie,Todd Sturgis,Tamera Sturgis,Jessica Samko

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick evaluates Eddie Van Halen sneakers and a rigged roulette wheel, while Corey examines a sterling silver mint julep cup and Chum inspects a Louis Vuitton jacket.

credits.actor: Corey Harrison,Rick Harrison,Austin Chumlee Russell

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy confuses profit with prophet but still manages to be successful while Kenny tries to honour the history of San Bernardino.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Jarrod Schulz,Brandi Passante,Dave Hester,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Brandon Sheets,Ivy Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Casey Nezhoda,Thom Beers,Emily Wears,Mary Padian,Kenny Crossley,Justin Bryant,Edwina Registre,Shana Dahan,Barry Weiss

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Dave acquires nearly half while Ivy secures a tidy profit. However, Mary and Kenny ultimately shoulder the bulk of the work.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Jarrod Schulz,Brandi Passante,Dave Hester,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Brandon Sheets,Ivy Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Casey Nezhoda,Thom Beers,Emily Wears,Mary Padian,Kenny Crossley

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick evaluates Eddie Van Halen sneakers and a rigged roulette wheel, while Corey examines a sterling silver mint julep cup and Chum inspects a Louis Vuitton jacket.

credits.actor: Corey Harrison,Rick Harrison,Austin Chumlee Russell

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Brandi lets Danielle lead the way in Santa Ana and their bargain purchase is a trip. Later, Rene takes a gamble on interesting packaging as Ivy discovers something.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Jarrod Schulz,Brandi Passante,Dave Hester,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Brandon Sheets,Ivy Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Casey Nezhoda,Thom Beers,Emily Wears,Mary Padian,Kenny Crossley,Justin Bryant,Edwina Registre,Shana Dahan

programme.title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
programme.desc: Hritesh and Priti are a resourceful couple from Jodhpur who have managed to build a million-dollar venture by transforming waste to wealth.

credits.actor: Krushna Abhishek

programme.title: Nature Gone Wild
programme.desc: A buck crashes a party held at a beauty salon, a cobra hitches a ride with someone and a Bayou swamp goes down the drain.

credits.actor: Greg Aiello

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: A client comes at the shop to seek Danny's aid to restore a 1971 Road Runner, as a gift to his wife and step-daughter. Meanwhile, Mike and Roli settle old debts by gloving up and taking it to the mat.

credits.actor: Danny Koker,Kevin Mack,Mike \"Horny\" Henry

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: When Spanish Conquistadors obliterated the historical record of the Maya in the 16th century, they possibly wiped out evidence that ancient people travelled to America.

credits.actor: Robert Clotworthy,Giorgio A. Tsoukalos,Erich von Däniken,David Childress,William Henry,Linda Moulton Howe,David Wilcock,Jonathan Young,Jason Martell

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Elite bladesmiths gather at Texarkana's Bill Moran School, America's oldest bladesmithing institution where the three top artisans face gruelling trials, pushing their craft to extremes.

credits.actor: Grady Powell,J. Neilson,Doug Marcaida,David Baker,Ben Abbott

programme.title: Kings of Restoration
programme.desc: A unique quarter-scale model of 1932 Hudson car is brought to the shop. Meanwhile, a 1950's pillow speaker is brought for repair.

credits.actor: Rick Dale,Tyler Dale

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny works on a psychedelic chopper project that reminds him of the 1970s. However, he worries that he may not be able to give it up.

credits.actor: Danny Koker,Kevin Mack,Mike \"Horny\" Henry,Ryan Evans,Shannon Aikau

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

credits.actor: Corey Harrison,Rick Harrison,Austin Chumlee Russell

programme.title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
programme.desc: Take a look at a band from Kerala who use bamboo instruments to produce music. Also explore innovative drones made by the geniuses from IIT Delhi.

credits.actor: Krushna Abhishek

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy confuses profit with prophet but still manages to be successful while Kenny tries to honour the history of San Bernardino.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Jarrod Schulz,Brandi Passante,Dave Hester,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Brandon Sheets,Ivy Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Casey Nezhoda,Thom Beers,Emily Wears,Mary Padian,Kenny Crossley,Justin Bryant,Edwina Registre,Shana Dahan,Barry Weiss

programme.title: Leepu \u0026 Pitbull
programme.desc: The team takes on its first-ever pick-up truck, a Chevrolet S-10. Meanwhile, Pitbull replaces a junk motor with a refurbished 500-horsepower LS engine.

credits.actor: Steve Trimboli,Leepu Nizamuddin Awlia

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Musician DJ Ashba asks Danny and the team to customise his Lamborghini Murcielago into the ultimate man-car. Meanwhile, Ryan and Paulie try to find a Corvette with a good exterior and a bad interior.

credits.actor: Danny Koker,Kevin Mack,Mike \"Horny\" Henry,Ryan Evans,Shannon Aikau

programme.title: India: Marvels \u0026 Mysteries With William Dalrymple
programme.desc: The host, William Dalrymple, travels across India to uncover previously unknown information about its ancient civilisation.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Druids possibly used to travel to New England and New York's Hudson Valley centuries ago, bringing with them the beliefs and technologies of their alien mentors.

credits.actor: Robert Clotworthy,Giorgio A. Tsoukalos,Erich von Däniken,David Childress,William Henry,Linda Moulton Howe,David Wilcock,Jonathan Young,Jason Martell

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick faces a choice when a vendor presents model F1 cars. Meanwhile, Rick and Corey examine an autographed Taylor Swift guitar.

credits.actor: Corey Harrison,Rick Harrison,Austin Chumlee Russell

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy gains a bit of Slavic success at a supervisory role in Stanton. Meanwhile, Brandi helps Danielle decorate her new apartment.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Brandi Passante,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Barry Weiss,Ivy Calvin,Ivy Calvin Jr.,Isaiah Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Kenny Crossley,Lisa DeLarios,Dusty Riach,Thom Beers

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Brandi wakes up in a sour mood but turns it around by acquiring a locker in Placentia, while Kenny struggles to get through the day.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Jarrod Schulz,Brandi Passante,Dave Hester,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Brandon Sheets,Ivy Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Casey Nezhoda,Thom Beers,Emily Wears,Mary Padian,Kenny Crossley,Justin Bryant,Edwina Registre,Shana Dahan

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy Calvin and his father try to find out who among them is the most profitable. Meanwhile, Brandi's secret weapon lands her in trouble, but Kenny comes to her help.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Jarrod Schulz,Brandi Passante,Dave Hester,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Brandon Sheets,Ivy Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Casey Nezhoda,Thom Beers,Emily Wears,Mary Padian,Kenny Crossley,Justin Bryant,Edwina Registre,Shana Dahan,Barry Weiss

programme.title: Secrets of Penthouse
programme.desc: Penthouse's 1990s success propels Bob Guccione into risky ventures including cryogenics and an Atlantic City casino. Meanwhile, his son Nick's foray into video production ends abruptly.

programme.title: Secrets of Penthouse
programme.desc: Penthouse's 1990s success propels Bob Guccione into risky ventures including cryogenics and an Atlantic City casino. Meanwhile, his son Nick's foray into video production ends abruptly.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: The filmmaker sheds light on peculiar places like a city where a zipline is required to commute, a town that is crawling with monkeys and a waterfall of blood.

credits.actor: Dan Aykroyd,Adam Richman,Hakeem Oluseyi,Mitch Horowitz,Don Wildman,Martin K.A. Morgan

programme.title: History's Greatest Heists With Pierce Brosnan
programme.desc: The host sheds light on the Antwerp diamond heist and how the thieves executed their intricate plan after 27 months of planning.

credits.actor: Pierce Brosnan

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Marc is weighed down by a load that might just be more than the Boar can tackle. Meanwhile, Dusty gets stuck hauling some very unique art sculptures.

credits.actor: Marc Springer,Jennifer Brennan,Jarrett Joyce,Christopher Hanna,Robbie Welsh,Dusty Davie,Todd Sturgis,Tamera Sturgis,Jessica Samko

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

credits.actor: Corey Harrison,Rick Harrison,Austin Chumlee Russell,Richard Harrison

programme.title: Kings of Restoration
programme.desc: A unique quarter-scale model of 1932 Hudson car is brought to the shop. Meanwhile, a 1950's pillow speaker is brought for repair.

credits.actor: Rick Dale,Tyler Dale

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny inspects a collection featuring a 1993 Ford Roadster and 1953 Henry J. Later, Kevin, Ryan and Mike experience the strain of proving their unauthorized purchase's worth.

credits.actor: Danny Koker

programme.title: The Food That Built the World
programme.desc: In the early 1900s, an underestimated confectioner makes the first-ever wrapped penny candy. At the same time, an unemployed salesman transforms a medicinal candy into a fruit-flavoured treat.

credits.actor: Campbell Scott,Adam Richman,Libby O'Connell,Yohuru Williams

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Druids possibly used to travel to New England and New York's Hudson Valley centuries ago, bringing with them the beliefs and technologies of their alien mentors.

credits.actor: Robert Clotworthy,Giorgio A. Tsoukalos,Erich von Däniken,David Childress,William Henry,Linda Moulton Howe,David Wilcock,Jonathan Young,Jason Martell

programme.title: Royal India with Samira
programme.desc: Samira delves into the history of Udaipur, a city renowned for its grand palaces and ancient royal lineages. She also finds an opportunity to explore some of its culinary traditions.

credits.actor: Samira Nanda

programme.title: Omg! Yeh Mera India Classics
programme.desc: A compilation of the best episodes of 'OMG! Yeh Mera India', wherein the host sheds light on several inspiring and exciting stories from across India.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Knife or Death
programme.desc: Bladesmiths put a 47-inch Iberian Montante blade, an English billhook and other weapons through a series of gruelling tests before the final two competitors go through the Dead Run.

credits.actor: Bill Goldberg,Tu Lam,Travis Wuertz

programme.title: Life After People
programme.desc: After humanity ceases to exist, the global retail machine collapses. Malls decay and shipping lanes turn deadly, while grocery stores become war zones for rodents and predators.

credits.actor: James Lurie

programme.title: India: Marvels \u0026 Mysteries With William Dalrymple
programme.desc: The host, William Dalrymple, travels across India to uncover previously unknown information about its ancient civilisation.

programme.title: Tour D' Royale
programme.desc: The filmmaker takes a deep dive into the rich culture and heritage of Rajasthan and Gujarat by visiting luxurious palaces and mansions.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: Explore some of the interesting and bizarre revenge stories, including the one about a Colorado man who used a killdozer to settle a dispute and an emperor's vengeance towards his wife's lover.

credits.actor: Dan Aykroyd,Adam Richman,Hakeem Oluseyi,Mitch Horowitz,Don Wildman,Martin K.A. Morgan

programme.title: The Kingdom of Krishna
programme.desc: A land of legend, Dwarka is one of the prominent pilgrimage sites in Hinduism. It holds historical and mythological significance as the home of Lord Krishna.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Marc is weighed down by a load that might just be more than the Boar can tackle. Meanwhile, Dusty gets stuck hauling some very unique art sculptures.

credits.actor: Marc Springer,Jennifer Brennan,Jarrett Joyce,Christopher Hanna,Robbie Welsh,Dusty Davie,Todd Sturgis,Tamera Sturgis,Jessica Samko

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy Calvin and his father try to find out who among them is the most profitable. Meanwhile, Brandi's secret weapon lands her in trouble, but Kenny comes to her help.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Jarrod Schulz,Brandi Passante,Dave Hester,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Brandon Sheets,Ivy Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Casey Nezhoda,Thom Beers,Emily Wears,Mary Padian,Kenny Crossley,Justin Bryant,Edwina Registre,Shana Dahan,Barry Weiss

programme.desc: Ivy gains a bit of Slavic success at a supervisory role in Stanton. Meanwhile, Brandi helps Danielle decorate her new apartment.

programme.desc: Rick faces a choice when a vendor presents model F1 cars. Meanwhile, Rick and Corey examine an autographed Taylor Swift guitar.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Brandi wakes up in a sour mood but turns it around by acquiring a locker in Placentia, while Kenny struggles to get through the day.

programme.title: A Taste of Travel
programme.desc: Scotty checks out the Valley of the Mist in Coffs Harbour, before exploring the Victorian high country. Meanwhile, Alana takes a trip to the spices markets of Istanbul.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths face a cleaver challenge with meat hook steel, while two finalists forge a formidable Maguro Bocho tuna knife for the win.

credits.actor: Grady Powell,J. Neilson,Doug Marcaida,David Baker,Ben Abbott

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jessica signs up to move a half-ton steampunk robot in a single day. Meanwhile, Todd and Tamera realise that moonshine stills and porcelain plates don't mix well.

credits.actor: Marc Springer,Jennifer Brennan,Jarrett Joyce,Christopher Hanna,Robbie Welsh,Dusty Davie,Todd Sturgis,Tamera Sturgis,Jessica Samko

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

credits.actor: Corey Harrison,Rick Harrison,Austin Chumlee Russell

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy Calvin and his father try to find out who among them is the most profitable. Meanwhile, Brandi's secret weapon lands her in trouble, but Kenny comes to her help.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy gains a bit of Slavic success at a supervisory role in Stanton. Meanwhile, Brandi helps Danielle decorate her new apartment.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

credits.actor: Corey Harrison,Rick Harrison,Austin Chumlee Russell

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Brandi wakes up in a sour mood but turns it around by acquiring a locker in Placentia, while Kenny struggles to get through the day.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Jarrod Schulz,Brandi Passante,Dave Hester,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Brandon Sheets,Ivy Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Casey Nezhoda,Thom Beers,Emily Wears,Mary Padian,Kenny Crossley,Justin Bryant,Edwina Registre,Shana Dahan

programme.title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
programme.desc: Discover the story of Prem Ganapathy, the visionary entrepreneur behind Dosa Plaza and meet a group of young Indian scientists who built the world's smallest satellite.

credits.actor: Krushna Abhishek

programme.title: Special Operations: India Myanmar
programme.desc: The filmmaker highlights the cross-border special operation conducted by Indian forces against NSCN-K insurgents along the India-Myanmar border.

programme.title: India: Marvels \u0026 Mysteries
programme.desc: Explore the arcgitectural perfection of Khajuraho Temples and investigate the secrets of the Buddhist monks at the Kye Monastery.

programme.title: The Einstein Challenge
programme.desc: Dr. Greg Ojakangas and Grant Harkness explore various concepts like colonising Mars and importance of wearing one's helmet in space.

programme.title: Born to be Wild
programme.desc: With just a horse and limited provisions, Andrew sets off on a perilous 600-kilometer journey through Australia's harsh terrains.

credits.actor: Andrew Ucles

programme.title: Nature Gone Wild
programme.desc: Nature unleashes its wild side as a jogger experiences a terrifying incident with a cougar. Meanwhile, an octopus performs a baffling disappearing act.

credits.actor: Greg Aiello

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Discover the skilled smith who passes three gruelling challenges in order to win 20,000 dollars for themselves and $10,000 in forging equipment for their shop.

credits.actor: Grady Powell,J. Neilson,Doug Marcaida,David Baker,Ben Abbott

programme.title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
programme.desc: The host meets Vikram Singh, who abandons his mechanic job for bubble art. Resourcefully, using homemade solutions and scrap props, he crafts wonders including human-sized and smoke bubbles.

credits.actor: Krushna Abhishek

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy Calvin and his father try to find out who among them is the most profitable. Meanwhile, Brandi's secret weapon lands her in trouble, but Kenny comes to her help.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Jarrod Schulz,Brandi Passante,Dave Hester,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Brandon Sheets,Ivy Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Casey Nezhoda,Thom Beers,Emily Wears,Mary Padian,Kenny Crossley,Justin Bryant,Edwina Registre,Shana Dahan,Barry Weiss

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny tries to make a big profit by restoring and flipping a 1970s Chevy C10 pickup, but a botched paint job threatens to ruin his plans.

credits.actor: Danny Koker,Kevin Mack,Mike \"Horny\" Henry,Ryan Evans,Shannon Aikau

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

credits.actor: Corey Harrison,Rick Harrison,Austin Chumlee Russell,Richard Harrison

programme.title: Roads Unknown: India
programme.desc: Adventure motorcyclist Jess Zahra journeys across India where she meets diverse people and experiences vivid landscapes.

credits.actor: Jessica Zahra

programme.title: India: Marvels \u0026 Mysteries With William Dalrymple
programme.desc: The host, William Dalrymple, travels across India to uncover previously unknown information about its ancient civilisation.

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman
programme.desc: Forrest Tucker is a veteran escape artist who, despite his aging body, manages to execute one of the most audacious prison breaks of all time from San Quentin prison.

credits.actor: Morgan Freeman

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick faces a choice when a vendor presents model F1 cars. Meanwhile, Rick and Corey examine an autographed Taylor Swift guitar.

credits.actor: Corey Harrison,Rick Harrison,Austin Chumlee Russell

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Lisa returns to Moreno Valley, where it all started and gets nostalgic with her locker. Meanwhile, Kenny welcomes a new granddaughter to the clan.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Brandi Passante,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Barry Weiss,Ivy Calvin,Ivy Calvin Jr.,Isaiah Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Kenny Crossley,Lisa DeLarios,Dusty Riach,Thom Beers

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Barry takes on a new disciple and Lisa gets clinical with her find, forcing her to take a closer look. Meanwhile, the new guy pays heavily for a unit.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Jarrod Schulz,Brandi Passante,Dave Hester,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Brandon Sheets,Ivy Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Casey Nezhoda,Thom Beers,Emily Wears,Mary Padian,Kenny Crossley,Justin Bryant,Edwina Registre,Shana Dahan

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: While Darrell helps Kimber with her new botique, Kenny remains confident in his plan in Stanton, California. Realising her need for a distraction, Rene brings Casey along.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Jarrod Schulz,Brandi Passante,Dave Hester,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Brandon Sheets,Ivy Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Casey Nezhoda,Thom Beers,Emily Wears,Mary Padian,Kenny Crossley,Justin Bryant,Edwina Registre,Shana Dahan,Barry Weiss

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: Explore some of the interesting and bizarre revenge stories, including the one about a Colorado man who used a killdozer to settle a dispute and an emperor's vengeance towards his wife's lover.

credits.actor: Dan Aykroyd,Adam Richman,Hakeem Oluseyi,Mitch Horowitz,Don Wildman,Martin K.A. Morgan

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: Explore some of the interesting and bizarre revenge stories, including the one about a Colorado man who used a killdozer to settle a dispute and an emperor's vengeance towards his wife's lover.

credits.actor: Dan Aykroyd,Adam Richman,Hakeem Oluseyi,Mitch Horowitz,Don Wildman,Martin K.A. Morgan

programme.title: Life After People
programme.desc: Without humans, water becomes a destroyer that brings chaos, flooding cities, collapsing dams and awakening ancient forces that were previously contained.

credits.actor: James Lurie

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank visit a gorgeous Kentucky property with a racetrack. Later, a freestyle stop in North Carolina looks like a bust until they unearth a one-of-a-kind TV relic.

credits.actor: Mike Wolfe,Frank Fritz

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jessica signs up to move a half-ton steampunk robot in a single day. Meanwhile, Todd and Tamera realise that moonshine stills and porcelain plates don't mix well.

credits.actor: Marc Springer,Jennifer Brennan,Jarrett Joyce,Christopher Hanna,Robbie Welsh,Dusty Davie,Todd Sturgis,Tamera Sturgis,Jessica Samko

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

credits.actor: Corey Harrison,Rick Harrison,Austin Chumlee Russell,Richard Harrison

programme.title: Kings of Restoration
programme.desc: A group of experts tries to restore American vintage items to their original state while facing a number of challenges during the job.

credits.actor: Rick Dale,Tyler Dale,Rick Harrison,Ryan Carter

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Ryan works on a secret project for Bones Legacy. Meanwhile, a Chevy Impala redefines the term low-rider, stunning Mike and Roli. Later, Danny checks out a Satellite Sebring but cannot crack a deal.

credits.actor: Danny Koker

programme.title: The Food That Built the World
programme.desc: Will Kellogg's ultimate reign is thrown into chaos after the arrival of a young flour mill executive whose product gives birth to a decades-long war for dominance between Kellogg's and General Mills.

credits.actor: Campbell Scott,Adam Richman,Libby O'Connell,Yohuru Williams

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The filmmaker sheds light on the existence of serpent Gods in the religious traditions of several places in the Asian and South American regions.

credits.actor: Robert Clotworthy,Giorgio A. Tsoukalos,Erich von Däniken,David Childress,William Henry,Linda Moulton Howe,David Wilcock,Jonathan Young,Jason Martell

programme.title: Royal India with Samira
programme.desc: Udaipur's prince grants Samira exclusive access to the City Palace where his personal staff guide her to hidden terraces and breathtaking vistas.

credits.actor: Samira Nanda

programme.title: Omg! Yeh Mera India Classics
programme.desc: A compilation of the best episodes of 'OMG! Yeh Mera India', wherein the host sheds light on several inspiring and exciting stories from across India.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Knife or Death
programme.desc: Competitors test the mettle of a hybrid Yatagan sabre, a two-handed Bowie knife and other bladed weapons. Later, a female bladesmith comes close to a first-time achievement.

credits.actor: Bill Goldberg,Tu Lam,Travis Wuertz

programme.title: Born to be Wild
programme.desc: Survivalist Andrew Ucles travels to Africa in order to fulfil his mission of finding twelve fierce animals within seven days.

credits.actor: Andrew Ucles

programme.title: India: Marvels \u0026 Mysteries With William Dalrymple
programme.desc: The host, William Dalrymple, travels across India to uncover previously unknown information about its ancient civilisation.

programme.title: Tour D' Royale
programme.desc: The filmmaker takes a deep dive into the rich culture and heritage of Rajasthan and Gujarat by visiting luxurious palaces and mansions.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: The filmmaker sheds light on lesser-known unbelievable stories about fantastic animals, like a warrior bear that helped the Allies win WWII, and real-life hobbit-like humans in Indonesia.

credits.actor: Dan Aykroyd,Adam Richman,Hakeem Oluseyi,Mitch Horowitz,Don Wildman,Martin K.A. Morgan

programme.title: Daksineshwar - Legends of Kali
programme.desc: The filmmaker focuses on the rich mythology of the prominent Hindu Goddess Kali and the history of one of the most famous temples dedicated to her in Dakshineswar, Kolkata, India.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jessica signs up to move a half-ton steampunk robot in a single day. Meanwhile, Todd and Tamera realise that moonshine stills and porcelain plates don't mix well.

credits.actor: Marc Springer,Jennifer Brennan,Jarrett Joyce,Christopher Hanna,Robbie Welsh,Dusty Davie,Todd Sturgis,Tamera Sturgis,Jessica Samko

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: While Darrell helps Kimber with her new botique, Kenny remains confident in his plan in Stanton, California. Realising her need for a distraction, Rene brings Casey along.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Jarrod Schulz,Brandi Passante,Dave Hester,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Brandon Sheets,Ivy Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Casey Nezhoda,Thom Beers,Emily Wears,Mary Padian,Kenny Crossley,Justin Bryant,Edwina Registre,Shana Dahan,Barry Weiss
